name: The "B I G" owner
description:
A cotton candy looking species named "Blotton" has its own pet named "Gala"

Very tired from taking care of him, yet Gala looks completely grown up, but still cares him

He is also kind of a chef, mostly takes care of his pet and rest on his belly

Though, Gala may surprisingly be more hungry and can accidentally eat stuff.

This artwork goes from me!
creator: Thecoolieguy441
